name: Muslin Swaddle Blanket Boutique 3pk - Cloud Island™: 100% Cotton Baby Wraps with Stripe Design
description:
Complement the refined look of your nursery decor with these Muslin Swaddle Blankets from cloud island™. These swaddling blankets are durable and provide a slight stretchiness to keep your baby swaddled but not too constricted, while 100% cotton muslin assures they're soft, breathable and comfortable for baby. Gender-neutral patterns make them easy to gift at any stage, and they're perfect for baby showers, hospital visits and putting on registries. Used as a stroller cover on the go, a blanket for around the home or a burp cloth when feeding, you're sure to appreciate the array of uses you'll get out of this nursery necessity.

We made it better so you can feel better. To keep you safe from harmful substances, this product has been independently tested and certified against a list of over 350 harmful chemicals according to strict STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® guidelines.
